creator: bsdcode@disroot.org
text:
(In reply to Robert Clausecker from comment #3)
Thanks for taking a deeper look into the available fonts, somehow I missed x11-fonts/freefont-ttf... I will look into it again and try to get more fonts into the patch. Will provide it in the next days.

> As the maintainer, I expect that you look into all changes that happen when the
> port is updated.  Changes in the fonts are easy to see from the changed pkg-plist,
> so it doesn't seem like a hard thing to check for.

I articulated it the wrong way. Of course I check all the changes for new releases of ports I maintain and try to adapt the ports in the best way possible. I mean it the other way around, I probably won't check constantly if new changes in font ports are made and see if further fonts can be unbundled in emulators/es-de. Especially when the font filenames in the font ports are not matching with the expected filenames in es-de, which seems to be the case with korean/nanum-square.
